{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211225444ECCB4CAFE0CB17B3F0E"}"},"total":92},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7416694622537204542","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看了这么多同人文。唯一一个感觉合情合理被救赎，看着不会令人尴尬的文野，各个故事情节的发展，太宰治的剧本精人设，津岛修治人设的描述。都很完美，和魔人的对决也很精彩。还补全了主世界织田作之助的遗憾「死后五年复活了」
说实话我都想修治和太宰直接在一起了
后面首领宰和首领中的感情描述也很奈斯
为什么评分这么低，我感觉值得十分好评！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726839273,"group_id":"7237703287829433378","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"即兴写作，随缘更新。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0yeCzyVl+CjyXUYjaEWucFhD3Fv4arDr1EyRy0DGBtY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07c336566ef14e0891e75c0f02d2a42e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618640&x-signature=f0RhS8iHLU1PiGtHypr%2FHo6WbcA%3D","user_id":"2176679337533972","user_name":"迷鹿清欢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2176679337533972","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1649439152,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7237703287829433378","book_info":{"abstract":"【正文无CP完结，番外有双黑等CP。由于全书完结错字错句无法整改，对此造成的不便，非常抱歉。
2025.2.11补：本文含极少量名柯成分，因本文完结无法修改，请读者小可爱自行甄别。】
        镭钵街的爆炸让太宰治的体内多出了一个同名文豪。
　　文豪拥有的名为樱桃的异能力，又成功的让哒宰成为了一个拥有绑定奶的人。
　　但是可怕的后遗症成功的让哒宰偏离了预定的道路。
　　作者文案废柴有耐心的小可爱可以第一章瞅一眼，爱所有追文的小可爱，大声表白！

文艺版文案：
你是外表美丽、内心酸涩的红樱桃，
我是外表暗沉、入口甜蜜的黑樱桃。
我们是同一个柄上衍生出来，
相似又不同的存在，
到底是命运的垂青，
还是恶魔的狂笑，
死去、凋零、重生、一体，
本来就模糊不清的命运，是否能够迎来久违的欢声笑语呢？
-------------
来自作者的贴心小提示：
由于个人还在努力的研究文豪太宰作品的内涵，如有OOC的地方请多多包涵。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2c7e2bd24faa2fcb52c58ef85ff8701a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"风格兰仕","author_id":"","book_id":"7237703287829433378","book_name":"文野太宰与文炼太宰一体双魂","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7237703414669378060","read_count":"665","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"423992"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"119","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/877a4636fae239e67240e75aa52b4f02~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779251144&x-signature=NpBlp5hF7btyYF7oH4IZ%2BlYGLIs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"572184569581460","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"156"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211225444ECCB4CAFE0CB17B3F0E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":24790,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":37317,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2171},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7324233523422315318","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常棒，作者大大的文笔深得我心，一场救赎，两个人的纠缠，在战火中更显得和平的可贵，看到太宰先生和津岛修治的番外后，既心痛又开心，我为伤心太宰先生和津岛即将离开而伤心，也为宰宰能平安无恙的活到八十多岁而高兴。我会记得这本书的，他让我稍微改变了一点对世界的看法，和平是珍贵的，再过悲剧世界也是充满美好。
   为我喜欢的书和写下这本书的辛苦的作者大大献上我的祝福和我的观后感！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705307545,"group_id":"7237703287829433378","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/vzaZ9EkJtuJAvdir2TRIqBZyYgS6c9o4iuS3LRe/eS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2806419750130236","user_name":"夜半问晴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2806419750130236","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7237703287829433378","book_info":{"abstract":"【正文无CP完结，番外有双黑等CP。由于全书完结错字错句无法整改，对此造成的不便，非常抱歉。
